storyboards.label: Problem → Solution
storyboards.description: Present a relatable problem and provide the solution

storyboards.label: Before vs After (Transformation)
storyboards.description: Showcase dramatic transformations and results

storyboards.label: Step-by-Step Guide / Tutorial
storyboards.description: Break down complex processes into easy steps

storyboards.label: POV Story (First-Person Angle)
storyboards.description: Share personal experiences from your perspective

storyboards.label: Relatable Skit (Everyday Situation)
storyboards.description: Act out common scenarios your audience faces

storyboards.label: Time-Lapse Journey
storyboards.description: Compress long processes into engaging quick views

storyboards.label: Testimonial / Review Format
storyboards.description: Share honest reviews and testimonials

storyboards.label: Expectation vs Reality
storyboards.description: Contrast what people expect vs what actually happens

storyboards.label: Countdown or List (Top 3, Top 5, etc.)
storyboards.description: Organize content in numbered countdown format

storyboards.label: Myth Busting / Fact-Checking
storyboards.description: Debunk common misconceptions with facts

storyboards.label: Challenge Completion (Start to Finish)
storyboards.description: Document the entire journey of completing a challenge

storyboards.label: Behind the Scenes
storyboards.description: Show the process behind your content or work

storyboards.label: Day in My Life / Routine
storyboards.description: Share your daily routines and lifestyle

storyboards.label: Unboxing / Reveal
storyboards.description: Build anticipation with product reveals and unboxings

storyboards.label: Comparison (A vs B)
storyboards.description: Compare two products, methods, or options side by side

storyboards.label: Voiceover with Visual Actions
storyboards.description: Narrate while showing visual demonstrations

storyboards.label: Screen Recording with Narration
storyboards.description: Capture screen activities with explanatory narration

storyboards.label: Q&A / You Asked, I Answer
storyboards.description: Address audience questions in dedicated Q&A format

storyboards.label: Reaction + Commentary (Duet, Stitch, etc.)
storyboards.description: React to and comment on existing content

storyboards.label: Mini Storytelling (Beginning → Conflict → Resolution)
storyboards.description: Tell complete stories with clear narrative structure
